## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Infra/IaC

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Docker images build successfully
- [ ] Security scan reviewed

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No deployment changes
- [ ] Kubernetes manifest changes
- [ ] Terraform changes
- [ ] Pipeline changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue/work item
- [ ] Added or updated relevant docs
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Ready for review
